title: Long Time No Sword (Longsword)
description: A configurable addon for Tinkers' Construct that brings back the longsword
body:
# Long Time No Sword
A configurable addon for Tinkers' Construct that brings back the Longsword
![Longsword (3rd-person view)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7f31148c38baeeb567cd109043113f21057ef94_0.webp)

## Overview
You can control:
- the vertical/horizontal velocity of the lunge ability
- whether it should have a cooldown
- how long to wait before using it
- what sound it uses
- which animation to use while holding

... and more

[![Support me on Ko-fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ea724bdc4fc0daa04bebac2ef881a89fbafe8bc5.png)](https://ko-fi.com/W7W21Z2KUO)

Preview available on YouTube:
